bms_registers.name: Functional Safety Warning
bms_registers.description: Bitfield register for first-level functional safety faults.

bms_registers.name: BCU External Fault Alarm
bms_registers.description: Bitfield register for BCU/BMU external critical faults.

bms_registers.name: External Critical Alarm 1
bms_registers.description: Bitfield register for first-level voltage/current/temperature/insulation faults.

bms_registers.name: External Alarm 1
bms_registers.description: Bitfield register for second-level voltage/current/temperature/insulation alarms.

bms_registers.name: External Warning 1
bms_registers.description: Bitfield register for third-level warnings.

bms_registers.name: External Critical Alarm 2
bms_registers.description: Bitfield register for additional first-level rack/module faults.

bms_registers.name: External Alarm 2
bms_registers.description: Bitfield register for additional second-level rack/module alarms.

bms_registers.name: External Warning 2
bms_registers.description: Bitfield register for additional third-level rack/module warnings.

bms_registers.name: Pre-Power / Precharge Stage
bms_registers.description: 0=Idle, 1/2=Precharging, 3=Precharge success, 4=Precharge failed.

bms_registers.name: BCU System State
bms_registers.description: 0=Normal/Idle, 1=Charge forbidden, 2=Discharge forbidden, 3=Standby, 4=Stop/Shutdown.

bms_registers.name: Heartbeat Number
bms_registers.description: Heartbeat frame/counter, expected to increment periodically.

bms_registers.name: Receive Configuration State
bms_registers.description: 0=BMU/slave registration failed, 1=BMU/slave registration success.

bms_registers.name: Precharge Failure Reason
bms_registers.description: Reserved/vendor-specific precharge failure reason.

bms_registers.name: Charge / Discharge State
bms_registers.description: 0=Idle, 1=Discharge, 2=Charge.

bms_registers.name: Full or Empty Flag
bms_registers.description: 0=Full, 1=Empty, as per workbook. Field validation recommended.

bms_registers.name: BCU Contactor State
bms_registers.description: Bitfield: positive relay, precharge relay, negative relay, disconnector feedback.

bms_registers.name: Display SOC
bms_registers.description: Workbook unit is per-mille; converted to percent by value * 0.1.

bms_registers.name: SOH
bms_registers.description: Workbook unit is per-mille; converted to percent by value * 0.1.

bms_registers.name: Maximum Battery Temperature Rise BMU Number
Maximum Battery Temperature Rise Number In BMU
Maximum Battery Temperature Rise Number In BCU
Rack Internal SOC
bms_registers.description: Workbook unit is per-mille; converted to percent by value * 0.1.

bms_registers.name: CAN Hall Sample Current Original Value
Current/Voltage Hall Sample Current Original Value
Start Insulation Sampling
bms_registers.description: Write 1 to start/reset insulation sampling; other value = no action.

bms_registers.name: Start Precharge Operation
bms_registers.description: Write 0x01 to start precharge; other value = stop/open precharge path.

bms_registers.name: BCU Reset
bms_registers.description: Write 0x01 to reset BCU; other value = no reset.

bms_registers.name: Fan Force Control
bms_registers.description: Write 1=Fan ON, 2=Fan OFF. 0 may be used by EMS as auto/no-force if validated.

future_asset_protocol_examples.json.note: Documentation-only example. Do not use this file to start the gateway until the matching protocol drivers/services are implemented.
